info.name: Cheese Blast Corn N Cheese Burger
info.description: Corn-and-cheese patty, gherkins, onions, Thousand Island, and a molten cheddar core. Creamy, crunchy, dangerously delightful. (Energy: 740KCal, Carbohydrates: 80gm, Proteins: 20gm, Fats: 39gm, Sodium: 1577mg)

info.name: Cheese Blast Crispy Veg Burger

info.name: Cheese Blast Crispy Chicken Burger

info.name: Cheese Blast American BBQ Veggie Burger

info.name: Cheese Blast Homestyle Chicken Burger

info.name: Crispy Veg Burger
info.description: Crunchy, golden tikki, onion rings, and creamy sauce. A nostalgic bite thats just next-level. (Energy: 404KCal, Carbohydrates: 54gm, Proteins: 7gm, Fats: 17gm, Sodium: 902mg)

info.name: Double Patty Crispy Chicken Burger
info.description: Double the crispy, golden chicken patties with creamy coleslaw. Extra juicy, extra crunchy, and downright irresistible. (Energy: 693KCal, Carbohydrates: 64gm, Proteins: 29gm, Fats: 35gm, Sodium: 1748mg)

info.name: Smoky Chipotle Chicken Burger

info.name: Spicy Paneer Delight Burger

info.name: Double Patty Crispy Veg Burger
info.description: Double the golden, crunchy Patties, fresh onion rings, and creamy sauce -all stacked in a soft bun. Twice the nostalgia, twice the indulgence. (Energy: 598KCal, Carbohydrates: 75gm, Proteins: 10gm, Fats: 28gm, Sodium: 1485mg)

info.description: Irresistible Cajun burger, fries and Coke combo. Straight outta Louisiana to have your cravings asking for more.

info.name: Veg Pizza Puff
info.description: Crispy on the outside, cheesy and loaded with veggies on the inside. The perfect pizza-inspired snack on the go!

info.name: Cheesy Fries
info.description: Crispy golden fries drenched in gooey cheese. This combination hits hard. (Energy: 470KCal, Carbohydrates: 48gm, Proteins: 8gm, Fats: 27gm, Sodium: 435mg)

info.name: Crispy Fries
info.description: India's Crispiest Fries, packed with the perfect crunch

info.name: Vanilla Chocochip Muffin
info.description: Soft vanilla muffin topped with chocochips. Light, fluffy, and ready to pair with coffee. (Energy: 154KCal, Carbohydrates: 23gm, Proteins: 2gm, Fats: 7gm, Sodium: 193mg)

info.name: Choco Lava Cake

info.name: Lemon Ice Tea (250 mL)
info.description: Sip on this refreshing drink for a citsrusy lemon punch, infused with brewed tea. This iced tea is a perfect way to re-energize you anytime of the say ! (Energy: 117KCal, Carbohydrates: 45gm)

info.name: Masala Lemonade (200 mL)
info.description: 94KCal , Carbs: 24g. A refreshing classic drink with combined goodness of fresh lime , himalayan pink salt & infused spices. (Energy: 94KCal, Carbohydrates: 24gm)

info.name: Coke
info.description: Chilled Coca-Cola. Sharp fizz, smooth sip, burgers best friend. (Energy: 16KCal, Carbohydrates: 4gm, Sodium: 3mg)

info.name: Lemon Soda
info.description: Cool off with this zesty lemon soda, bursting with bright citrus flavour and lively fizz. A go-to drink for a quick and refreshing boost anytime! (Energy: 115KCal, Carbohydrates: 27gm, Sodium: 300mg)
